revision.text: {{Permanently protected}} {{Talk header}} {{Central|text=all sub-template talk pages and their related category talk pages; and the Lua module talk page, redirect here.}} {{Old XfD multi | date = 24 July 2010 | result = '''Keep''' | page = Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2010 July 24#Template:Normdaten | date2 = 15 November 2017 | result2 = '''[[WP:SNOW|Snowball]] keep''' | page2 = Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2017 November 15#Template:Authority control }} {{merged-from|talk=no|Wikipedia talk:Authority control|date=21 March 2022|target=Template talk:Authority control}} {{User:ClueBot III/ArchiveThis |archiveprefix=Template talk:Authority control/Archive |format= %%i |age=720 |header={{Automatic archive navigator}} |headerlevel=2 |maxarchsize=100000 |minkeepthreads=4 |numberstart=11 |minarchthreads=1 }}{{to do|collapsed=yes}} {{Authority control/related}} == National Library of Israel J9U ID == hello, Can someone change please the link to the National Library of Israel ([[:d:Property:P8189|P8189]]). It was changed to https://www.nli.org.il/en/authorities/$1. Thanks in advance. --[[User:geagea|geagea]][[User talk:geagea|Talk]] 11:14, 4 December 2024 (UTC) :{{Done|{{U|geagea|Done}}}}   ~ [[User:Tom.Reding|Tom.Reding]] ([[User talk:Tom.Reding|talk]] ⋅[[WP:DGAF|dgaf]])  11:33, 4 December 2024 (UTC) ::That was fast. thanks. --[[User:geagea|geagea]][[User talk:geagea|Talk]] 11:36, 4 December 2024 (UTC) == TDV error on [[Islamic views on slavery]] == {{authority control|qid=Q768361}} This article is showing an error with {{Q|P7314}} but I don't think it is an error, because [https://islamansiklopedisi.org.tr/k%C3%B6le köle] seems to work fine. Perhaps the pattern needs to be updated or removed. — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 23:14, 4 December 2024 (UTC) :Fixed by changing köle to kole, which still works — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 14:56, 5 December 2024 (UTC) == Template-protected edit request on 5 December 2024 == {{edit template-protected|Module:Authority control/config|answered=y}} In line 834 remove pnd #OLD link = 'https://www.deutsche-biographie.de/pnd$1.html?language=en', #NEW link = 'https://www.deutsche-biographie.de/$1.html?language=en', The pnd is from the old name Personennamendatei, which is now part of Gemeinsame Normdatei. Only some articles use the "pnd" in the citation section. E.g. here *not*: https://www.deutsche-biographie.de/118536117.html#dbocontent . Wikidata itself only uses the links without "pnd". [[User:Juliana Charlotta Engelhardt|Juliana Charlotta Engelhardt]] ([[User talk:Juliana Charlotta Engelhardt|talk]]) 20:47, 5 December 2024 (UTC) :Posted live and sandbox versions for comparison below — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 18:33, 16 December 2024 (UTC) :Seems to work with example below. Can you confirm the version without "pnd" will always work? — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 18:36, 16 December 2024 (UTC) :{{done}} — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 11:15, 19 December 2024 (UTC) ===Live=== {{authority control|show=P7902|qid=Q260}} ===Sandbox=== {{authority control/sandbox|show=P7902|qid=Q260}} == FID performing arts ID (P10608) == Please add FID performing arts ID ([[:d:Property:P10608|P10608]]) to Authority control. FID stands for Fachinformationsdienst. {{authority control/sandbox|qid=Q438806}} [[User:Grimes2|Grimes2]] ([[User talk:Grimes2|talk]]) 13:56, 9 December 2024 (UTC) :Support — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 18:37, 16 December 2024 (UTC) :{{done}}, but there is no pattern checking for this one yet — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 11:15, 19 December 2024 (UTC) == Edit request 23 December 2024 == {{Edit template-protected|answered=yes}} '''Description of suggested change:''' Insert the following at '''[[Module:Authority control/config]]''' (note that the identifiers are ordered by wikidata property ID) {'VICPARL', property = 12362, section = 6, pattern = '^[a-z]+(\-[a-z]+)*$', link = 'https://parliament.vic.gov.au/members/$1', label = 'Victorian Parliament', }, [[User:GMH Melbourne|GMH Melbourne]] ([[User talk:GMH Melbourne|talk]]) 02:03, 23 December 2024 (UTC) {{authority control/sandbox|qid=Q5216414}} [[User:Grimes2|Grimes2]] ([[User talk:Grimes2|talk]]) 04:43, 25 December 2024 (UTC) :{{Done|{{U|GMH Melbourne|Done}}}}   ~ [[User:Tom.Reding|Tom.Reding]] ([[User talk:Tom.Reding|talk]] ⋅[[WP:DGAF|dgaf]])  13:06, 26 December 2024 (UTC)

{{Permanently protected}} {{Talk header}} {{Central|text=all sub-template talk pages and their related category talk pages; and the Lua module talk page, redirect here.}} {{Old XfD multi | date = 24 July 2010 | result = '''Keep''' | page = Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2010 July 24#Template:Normdaten | date2 = 15 November 2017 | result2 = '''[[WP:SNOW|Snowball]] keep''' | page2 = Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2017 November 15#Template:Authority control }} {{merged-from|talk=no|Wikipedia talk:Authority control|date=21 March 2022|target=Template talk:Authority control}} {{User:ClueBot III/ArchiveThis |archiveprefix=Template talk:Authority control/Archive |format= %%i |age=720 |header={{Automatic archive navigator}} |headerlevel=2 |maxarchsize=100000 |minkeepthreads=4 |numberstart=11 |minarchthreads=1 }}{{to do|collapsed=yes}} {{Authority control/related}} == National Library of Israel J9U ID == hello, Can someone change please the link to the National Library of Israel ([[:d:Property:P8189|P8189]]). It was changed to https://www.nli.org.il/en/authorities/$1. Thanks in advance. --[[User:geagea|geagea]][[User talk:geagea|Talk]] 11:14, 4 December 2024 (UTC) :{{Done|{{U|geagea|Done}}}}   ~ [[User:Tom.Reding|Tom.Reding]] ([[User talk:Tom.Reding|talk]] ⋅[[WP:DGAF|dgaf]])  11:33, 4 December 2024 (UTC) ::That was fast. thanks. --[[User:geagea|geagea]][[User talk:geagea|Talk]] 11:36, 4 December 2024 (UTC) == TDV error on [[Islamic views on slavery]] == {{authority control|qid=Q768361}} This article is showing an error with {{Q|P7314}} but I don't think it is an error, because [https://islamansiklopedisi.org.tr/k%C3%B6le köle] seems to work fine. Perhaps the pattern needs to be updated or removed. — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 23:14, 4 December 2024 (UTC) :Fixed by changing köle to kole, which still works — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 14:56, 5 December 2024 (UTC) == Template-protected edit request on 5 December 2024 == {{edit template-protected|Module:Authority control/config|answered=y}} In line 834 remove pnd #OLD link = 'https://www.deutsche-biographie.de/pnd$1.html?language=en', #NEW link = 'https://www.deutsche-biographie.de/$1.html?language=en', The pnd is from the old name Personennamendatei, which is now part of Gemeinsame Normdatei. Only some articles use the "pnd" in the citation section. E.g. here *not*: https://www.deutsche-biographie.de/118536117.html#dbocontent . Wikidata itself only uses the links without "pnd". [[User:Juliana Charlotta Engelhardt|Juliana Charlotta Engelhardt]] ([[User talk:Juliana Charlotta Engelhardt|talk]]) 20:47, 5 December 2024 (UTC) :Posted live and sandbox versions for comparison below — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 18:33, 16 December 2024 (UTC) :Seems to work with example below. Can you confirm the version without "pnd" will always work? — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 18:36, 16 December 2024 (UTC) :{{done}} — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 11:15, 19 December 2024 (UTC) ===Live=== {{authority control|show=P7902|qid=Q260}} ===Sandbox=== {{authority control/sandbox|show=P7902|qid=Q260}} == FID performing arts ID (P10608) == Please add FID performing arts ID ([[:d:Property:P10608|P10608]]) to Authority control. FID stands for Fachinformationsdienst. {{authority control/sandbox|qid=Q438806}} [[User:Grimes2|Grimes2]] ([[User talk:Grimes2|talk]]) 13:56, 9 December 2024 (UTC) :Support — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 18:37, 16 December 2024 (UTC) :{{done}}, but there is no pattern checking for this one yet — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 11:15, 19 December 2024 (UTC) == Edit request 23 December 2024 == {{Edit template-protected|answered=yes}} '''Description of suggested change:''' Insert the following at '''[[Module:Authority control/config]]''' (note that the identifiers are ordered by wikidata property ID) {'VICPARL', property = 12362, section = 6, pattern = '^[a-z]+(\-[a-z]+)*$', link = 'https://parliament.vic.gov.au/members/$1', label = 'Victorian Parliament', }, [[User:GMH Melbourne|GMH Melbourne]] ([[User talk:GMH Melbourne|talk]]) 02:03, 23 December 2024 (UTC) {{authority control/sandbox|qid=Q5216414}} [[User:Grimes2|Grimes2]] ([[User talk:Grimes2|talk]]) 04:43, 25 December 2024 (UTC) :{{Done|{{U|GMH Melbourne|Done}}}}   ~ [[User:Tom.Reding|Tom.Reding]] ([[User talk:Tom.Reding|talk]] ⋅[[WP:DGAF|dgaf]])  13:06, 26 December 2024 (UTC)

{{Permanently protected}} {{Talk header}} {{Central|text=all sub-template talk pages and their related category talk pages; and the Lua module talk page, redirect here.}} {{Old XfD multi | date = 24 July 2010 | result = '''Keep''' | page = Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2010 July 24#Template:Normdaten | date2 = 15 November 2017 | result2 = '''[[WP:SNOW|Snowball]] keep''' | page2 = Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2017 November 15#Template:Authority control }} {{merged-from|talk=no|Wikipedia talk:Authority control|date=21 March 2022|target=Template talk:Authority control}} {{User:ClueBot III/ArchiveThis |archiveprefix=Template talk:Authority control/Archive |format= %%i |age=720 |header={{Automatic archive navigator}} |headerlevel=2 |maxarchsize=100000 |minkeepthreads=4 |numberstart=11 |minarchthreads=1 }}{{to do|collapsed=yes}} {{Authority control/related}} == National Library of Israel J9U ID == hello, Can someone change please the link to the National Library of Israel ([[:d:Property:P8189|P8189]]). It was changed to https://www.nli.org.il/en/authorities/$1. Thanks in advance. --[[User:geagea|geagea]][[User talk:geagea|Talk]] 11:14, 4 December 2024 (UTC) :{{Done|{{U|geagea|Done}}}}   ~ [[User:Tom.Reding|Tom.Reding]] ([[User talk:Tom.Reding|talk]] ⋅[[WP:DGAF|dgaf]])  11:33, 4 December 2024 (UTC) ::That was fast. thanks. --[[User:geagea|geagea]][[User talk:geagea|Talk]] 11:36, 4 December 2024 (UTC) == TDV error on [[Islamic views on slavery]] == {{authority control|qid=Q768361}} This article is showing an error with {{Q|P7314}} but I don't think it is an error, because [https://islamansiklopedisi.org.tr/k%C3%B6le köle] seems to work fine. Perhaps the pattern needs to be updated or removed. — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 23:14, 4 December 2024 (UTC) :Fixed by changing köle to kole, which still works — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 14:56, 5 December 2024 (UTC) == Template-protected edit request on 5 December 2024 == {{edit template-protected|Module:Authority control/config|answered=y}} In line 834 remove pnd #OLD link = 'https://www.deutsche-biographie.de/pnd$1.html?language=en', #NEW link = 'https://www.deutsche-biographie.de/$1.html?language=en', The pnd is from the old name Personennamendatei, which is now part of Gemeinsame Normdatei. Only some articles use the "pnd" in the citation section. E.g. here *not*: https://www.deutsche-biographie.de/118536117.html#dbocontent . Wikidata itself only uses the links without "pnd". [[User:Juliana Charlotta Engelhardt|Juliana Charlotta Engelhardt]] ([[User talk:Juliana Charlotta Engelhardt|talk]]) 20:47, 5 December 2024 (UTC) :Posted live and sandbox versions for comparison below — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 18:33, 16 December 2024 (UTC) :Seems to work with example below. Can you confirm the version without "pnd" will always work? — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 18:36, 16 December 2024 (UTC) :{{done}} — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 11:15, 19 December 2024 (UTC) ===Live=== {{authority control|show=P7902|qid=Q260}} ===Sandbox=== {{authority control/sandbox|show=P7902|qid=Q260}} == FID performing arts ID (P10608) == Please add FID performing arts ID ([[:d:Property:P10608|P10608]]) to Authority control. FID stands for Fachinformationsdienst. {{authority control/sandbox|qid=Q438806}} [[User:Grimes2|Grimes2]] ([[User talk:Grimes2|talk]]) 13:56, 9 December 2024 (UTC) :Support — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 18:37, 16 December 2024 (UTC) :{{done}}, but there is no pattern checking for this one yet — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 11:15, 19 December 2024 (UTC) == Edit request 23 December 2024 == {{Edit template-protected|answered=yes}} '''Description of suggested change:''' Insert the following at '''[[Module:Authority control/config]]''' (note that the identifiers are ordered by wikidata property ID) {'VICPARL', property = 12362, section = 6, pattern = '^[a-z]+(\-[a-z]+)*$', link = 'https://parliament.vic.gov.au/members/$1', label = 'Victorian Parliament', }, [[User:GMH Melbourne|GMH Melbourne]] ([[User talk:GMH Melbourne|talk]]) 02:03, 23 December 2024 (UTC) {{authority control/sandbox|qid=Q5216414}} [[User:Grimes2|Grimes2]] ([[User talk:Grimes2|talk]]) 04:43, 25 December 2024 (UTC) :{{Done|{{U|GMH Melbourne|Done}}}}   ~ [[User:Tom.Reding|Tom.Reding]] ([[User talk:Tom.Reding|talk]] ⋅[[WP:DGAF|dgaf]])  13:06, 26 December 2024 (UTC) [[Category:refreshing imported pages]]

Permanently protected Talk header Central|text=all sub-template talk pages and their related category talk pages; and the Lua module talk page, redirect here. Old XfD multi | date = 24 July 2010 | result = '''Keep''' | page = Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2010 July 24#Template:Normdaten | date2 = 15 November 2017 | result2 = '''[[WP:SNOW|Snowball]] keep''' | page2 = Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2017 November 15#Template:Authority control merged-from|talk=no|Wikipedia talk:Authority control|date=21 March 2022|target=Template talk:Authority control User:ClueBot III/ArchiveThis |archiveprefix=Template talk:Authority control/Archive |format= %%i |age=720 |header=Automatic archive navigator |headerlevel=2 |maxarchsize=100000 |minkeepthreads=4 |numberstart=11 |minarchthreads=1 to do|collapsed=yes Authority control/related == National Library of Israel J9U ID == hello, Can someone change please the link to the National Library of Israel ([[:d:Property:P8189|P8189]]). It was changed to https://www.nli.org.il/en/authorities/$1. Thanks in advance. --[[User:geagea|geagea]][[User talk:geagea|Talk]] 11:14, 4 December 2024 (UTC) :Done|U|geagea|Done   ~ [[User:Tom.Reding|Tom.Reding]] ([[User talk:Tom.Reding|talk]] ⋅[[WP:DGAF|dgaf]])  11:33, 4 December 2024 (UTC) ::That was fast. thanks. --[[User:geagea|geagea]][[User talk:geagea|Talk]] 11:36, 4 December 2024 (UTC) == TDV error on [[Islamic views on slavery]] == authority control|qid=Q768361 This article is showing an error with Q|P7314 but I don't think it is an error, because [https://islamansiklopedisi.org.tr/k%C3%B6le köle] seems to work fine. Perhaps the pattern needs to be updated or removed. — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 23:14, 4 December 2024 (UTC) :Fixed by changing köle to kole, which still works — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 14:56, 5 December 2024 (UTC) == Template-protected edit request on 5 December 2024 == edit template-protected|Module:Authority control/config|answered=y In line 834 remove pnd #OLD link = 'https://www.deutsche-biographie.de/pnd$1.html?language=en', #NEW link = 'https://www.deutsche-biographie.de/$1.html?language=en', The pnd is from the old name Personennamendatei, which is now part of Gemeinsame Normdatei. Only some articles use the "pnd" in the citation section. E.g. here *not*: https://www.deutsche-biographie.de/118536117.html#dbocontent . Wikidata itself only uses the links without "pnd". [[User:Juliana Charlotta Engelhardt|Juliana Charlotta Engelhardt]] ([[User talk:Juliana Charlotta Engelhardt|talk]]) 20:47, 5 December 2024 (UTC) :Posted live and sandbox versions for comparison below — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 18:33, 16 December 2024 (UTC) :Seems to work with example below. Can you confirm the version without "pnd" will always work? — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 18:36, 16 December 2024 (UTC) :done — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 11:15, 19 December 2024 (UTC) ===Live=== authority control|show=P7902|qid=Q260 ===Sandbox=== authority control/sandbox|show=P7902|qid=Q260 == FID performing arts ID (P10608) == Please add FID performing arts ID ([[:d:Property:P10608|P10608]]) to Authority control. FID stands for Fachinformationsdienst. authority control/sandbox|qid=Q438806 [[User:Grimes2|Grimes2]] ([[User talk:Grimes2|talk]]) 13:56, 9 December 2024 (UTC) :Support — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 18:37, 16 December 2024 (UTC) :done, but there is no pattern checking for this one yet — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 11:15, 19 December 2024 (UTC) == Edit request 23 December 2024 == Edit template-protected|answered=yes '''Description of suggested change:''' Insert the following at '''[[Module:Authority control/config]]''' (note that the identifiers are ordered by wikidata property ID) {'VICPARL', property = 12362, section = 6, pattern = '^[a-z]+(\-[a-z]+)*$', link = 'https://parliament.vic.gov.au/members/$1', label = 'Victorian Parliament', }, [[User:GMH Melbourne|GMH Melbourne]] ([[User talk:GMH Melbourne|talk]]) 02:03, 23 December 2024 (UTC) authority control/sandbox|qid=Q5216414 [[User:Grimes2|Grimes2]] ([[User talk:Grimes2|talk]]) 04:43, 25 December 2024 (UTC) :Done|U|GMH Melbourne|Done   ~ [[User:Tom.Reding|Tom.Reding]] ([[User talk:Tom.Reding|talk]] ⋅[[WP:DGAF|dgaf]])  13:06, 26 December 2024 (UTC)

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: Permanently protected Talk header Central|text=all sub-template talk pages and their related category talk pages; and the Lua module talk page, redirect here. Old XfD multi | date = 24 July 2010 | result = '''Keep''' | page = Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2010 July 24#Template:Normdaten | date2 = 15 November 2017 | result2 = '''[[WP:SNOW|Snowball]] keep''' | page2 = Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2017 November 15#Template:Authority control merged-from|talk=no|Wikipedia talk:Authority control|date=21 March 2022|target=Template talk:Authority control User:ClueBot III/ArchiveThis |archiveprefix=Template talk:Authority control/Archive |format= %%i |age=720 |header=Automatic archive navigator |headerlevel=2 |maxarchsize=100000 |minkeepthreads=4 |numberstart=11 |minarchthreads=1 to do|collapsed=yes Authority control/related == National Library of Israel J9U ID == hello, Can someone change please the link to the National Library of Israel ([[:d:Property:P8189|P8189]]). It was changed to https://www.nli.org.il/en/authorities/$1. Thanks in advance. --[[User:geagea|geagea]][[User talk:geagea|Talk]] 11:14, 4 December 2024 (UTC) :Done|U|geagea|Done   ~ [[User:Tom.Reding|Tom.Reding]] ([[User talk:Tom.Reding|talk]] ⋅[[WP:DGAF|dgaf]])  11:33, 4 December 2024 (UTC) ::That was fast. thanks. --[[User:geagea|geagea]][[User talk:geagea|Talk]] 11:36, 4 December 2024 (UTC) == TDV error on [[:en:Islamic views on slavery|Islamic views on slavery]] == authority control|qid=Q768361 This article is showing an error with Q|P7314 but I don't think it is an error, because [https://islamansiklopedisi.org.tr/k%C3%B6le köle] seems to work fine. Perhaps the pattern needs to be updated or removed. — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 23:14, 4 December 2024 (UTC) :Fixed by changing köle to kole, which still works — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 14:56, 5 December 2024 (UTC) == Template-protected edit request on 5 December 2024 == edit template-protected|Module:Authority control/config|answered=y In line 834 remove pnd #OLD link = 'https://www.deutsche-biographie.de/pnd$1.html?language=en', #NEW link = 'https://www.deutsche-biographie.de/$1.html?language=en', The pnd is from the old name Personennamendatei, which is now part of Gemeinsame Normdatei. Only some articles use the "pnd" in the citation section. E.g. here *not*: https://www.deutsche-biographie.de/118536117.html#dbocontent . Wikidata itself only uses the links without "pnd". [[User:Juliana Charlotta Engelhardt|Juliana Charlotta Engelhardt]] ([[User talk:Juliana Charlotta Engelhardt|talk]]) 20:47, 5 December 2024 (UTC) :Posted live and sandbox versions for comparison below — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 18:33, 16 December 2024 (UTC) :Seems to work with example below. Can you confirm the version without "pnd" will always work? — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 18:36, 16 December 2024 (UTC) :done — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 11:15, 19 December 2024 (UTC) ===Live=== authority control|show=P7902|qid=Q260 ===Sandbox=== authority control/sandbox|show=P7902|qid=Q260 == FID performing arts ID (P10608) == Please add FID performing arts ID ([[:d:Property:P10608|P10608]]) to Authority control. FID stands for Fachinformationsdienst. authority control/sandbox|qid=Q438806 [[User:Grimes2|Grimes2]] ([[User talk:Grimes2|talk]]) 13:56, 9 December 2024 (UTC) :Support — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 18:37, 16 December 2024 (UTC) :done, but there is no pattern checking for this one yet — Martin ([[User:MSGJ|MSGJ]] · [[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) 11:15, 19 December 2024 (UTC) == Edit request 23 December 2024 == Edit template-protected|answered=yes '''Description of suggested change:''' Insert the following at '''[[Module:Authority control/config]]''' (note that the identifiers are ordered by wikidata property ID) {'VICPARL', property = 12362, section = 6, pattern = '^[a-z]+(\-[a-z]+)*$', link = 'https://parliament.vic.gov.au/members/$1', label = 'Victorian Parliament', }, [[User:GMH Melbourne|GMH Melbourne]] ([[User talk:GMH Melbourne|talk]]) 02:03, 23 December 2024 (UTC) authority control/sandbox|qid=Q5216414 [[User:Grimes2|Grimes2]] ([[User talk:Grimes2|talk]]) 04:43, 25 December 2024 (UTC) :Done|U|GMH Melbourne|Done   ~ [[User:Tom.Reding|Tom.Reding]] ([[User talk:Tom.Reding|talk]] ⋅[[WP:DGAF|dgaf]])  13:06, 26 December 2024 (UTC)

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (no qid-linked ja/en/simple source); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 12:30, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Initial import == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 12:30, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- No source talk page found via linked QID sitelinks (ja/en/simple) at migration time. -->
